suite.name: Api-Campsites

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://travels.praegus.nl, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: API-03 POST creates a new campsite successfully

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'name': 'API Test Campsite 20260416130456', 'location': 'Test Valley, TX', 'description': 'Test campsite created by API smoke test.', 'pricePerNight': '42.0', 'capacity': '3', 'amenities': 'BBQ, Wate...
kw.arg: description=Test campsite created by API smoke test.
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites path_url=/api/campsites headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '370', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "API Test Campsite 20260416130456", "location": "Test Valley, TX", "description": "Test campsite created by API smoke test.", "pricePerNight": "42.0", "capacity": "3", "amenities": "BBQ, Water, Fire pit", "imageUrl": "https://example.com/test-campsite.jpg", "available": "True", "campsiteType": "tent", "terrainType": "forest", "accessibilityLevel": "moderate"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${created} = {'id': 10, 'name': 'API Test Campsite 20260416130456', 'location': 'Test Valley, TX', 'description': 'Test campsite created by API smoke test.', 'pricePerNight': 42.0, 'capacity': 3, 'amenities': 'BBQ...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites/10 path_url=/api/campsites/10 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${loaded} = {'id': 10, 'name': 'API Test Campsite 20260416130456', 'location': 'Test Valley, TX', 'description': 'Test campsite created by API smoke test.', 'pricePerNight': 42.0, 'capacity': 3, 'amenities': 'BBQ...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites/10 path_url=/api/campsites/10 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None

DELETE Response : url=https://travels.praegus.nl/api/campsites/10 status=204, reason=No Content headers={'Vary': 'Origin, Access-Control-Request-Method, Access-Control-Request-Headers', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-XSS-Protection': '0', 'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate', 'Pragma': 'no-cache', 'Expires': '0', 'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=31536000 ; includeSubDomains', 'X-Frame-Options': 'SAMEORIGIN', 'Date': 'Thu, 16 Apr 2026 11:04:56 GMT', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Alt-Svc': 'h3=":443"; ma=2592000,h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

suite.doc: API-testcases voor de campsite API van Praegus Travels.
